source.placeholder: Paste medical record text here. (For images / scanned PDFs, install mlx_vlm + DeepSeek-OCR weights, then drop the file via the loader below.)

dropzone.title: Drop image, PDF, or .txt here
dropzone.subtitle: or click to browse
dropzone.aria: Drop files or click to browse

run.disabledNoMapping: Add at least one patient to the mapping.
run.disabledNoSource: Paste or load some text first.

pipeline.runningSafetyNet: Running safety-net pass (this can take a few seconds)…
pipeline.todoW4: Pipeline orchestrator wiring lands in W4. The collision scan is live; redact + safety-net come next.
pipeline.txtOnlyForNow: For W4 minimal viable, only .txt source files are supported through the loader. Paste image-extracted text into the textarea instead.
pipeline.pasteHint: Selected: {{path}}. Paste its contents into the textarea above (file-read IPC is W5 polish).
pipeline.collisionApproved: Collision overrides recorded. Click Run pipeline again to proceed.
pipeline.exportedClipboard: Exported {{count}} resolved flag(s); redacted text copied to clipboard.

done.title: Redaction complete
done.message: Redacted text copied to clipboard. Paste it into your AI tool of choice; nothing left this machine un-redacted.

diff.title: Redaction preview
diff.timelineEmpty: No replacements match the current filter.
diff.copyOnlyForNow: Redacted text copied to clipboard. Real .md export lands in W5 polish.

v2Banner.title: Welcome to CellSentry v2
v2Banner.intro: CellSentry has shifted to a single-purpose tool: medical record pseudonymization, all local. The v1 Excel toolbox (audit / PII / extraction) has been removed.
v2Banner.bulletReplaced: v1 features (formula audit, PII redaction, document extraction) are no longer in this app.
v2Banner.bulletV1Available: v1.1.0-beta.1 is permanently downloadable from the GitHub release page.
v2Banner.bulletNoMigration: There is no migration path — v2 is a re-focus, not an upgrade.

safetyNet.title: Safety-net review — {{count}} names flagged
safetyNet.subtitle: Local Qwen2.5-3B reviewed the redacted output. Decide each flag below.

collision.title: Pipeline blocked — name overlaps detected
collision.summary: {{count}} overlap(s) found. Resolve each before continuing.
collision.explain: The longer name {{longer}} contains your mapping key {{shorter}} but is not itself in the mapping. Pseudonymizing {{shorter}} here would corrupt the legitimate longer name.

actions.add: Add {{longer}} to mapping with new pseudonym
actions.approve: Approve partial match (treat {{shorter}} here as mapped)
